creator: freebsd.org@reg.a0fs.net
text:
I have got e-mail message from update watching script from one of my servers with text:
---- 8< -----
Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 3 mirrors found.
Fetching metadata signature for 11.2-RELEASE from update4.freebsd.org... done.

Files on mirror (11.2-RELEASE-p10) appear older than what
we are currently running (11.2-RELEASE-p11)!
Cowardly refusing to proceed any further.
---- 8< -----
Date: Fri,  5 Jul 2019 08:58:06 +0300 (MSK)

Looks like this host is unsynced.
